issues.sample: THERE ARE OBSTRUCTIONS IN THE ACCELERATOR PEDAL AREA.  MY HUSBAND WEARS A SIZE 12 SHOE.  WHEN HE PRESSES DOWN ON THE PEDAL TO ACCELERATE QUICKLY, THE RIGHT SIDE OF HIS SHOE ENCOUNTERS AN OBSTRUCTION.  HE MOVES HIS FOOT OVER TO THE LEFT A LITTLE AND CAN GET THE PEDAL DOWN BUT THEN

narrative.headline: What 2017 Lexus Rc F owners report most
